name: Net Holding A.S.
summary: Net Holding A.S. engages in tourism and publishing activities in Turkey, Croatia, Bulgaria, Azerbaijan, Montenegro, and the Turkish Republic of Northern Cyprus. The company engages in the hotel and accommodation, touristic shopping, duty-free store management, and parking area businesses; and car rental, airport transfer, private jet charter, helicopter tour, other tour services businesses. It also publishes books and newspapers, as well as provides bookstore and stationery products and sells jewel. In addition, the company offers food and beverages products; and consulting services related to financing, investment, organization, and marketing and sales. Further, it engages in construction, agriculture activities, and casino management. The company was founded in 1974 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey.
